summary: First-finish smoke test for Rainbow Star light-theme B2B diamond site. Verified backend smoke endpoints (stats, diamonds filters, auth login/register, enquiries, request-stone, newsletter) and core frontend flows (home, contact, login gate, guest login, /natural combined inventory, Single/Box toggle, add-to-enquiry single-toast fix). All critical checks passed. Single toast confirmed (no StrictMode double-fire).
passed: Homepage shows 5000+ counter; NO 'RAINBOW STAR · EST. SURAT, INDIA' tagline; NO old phone 8145644444
Contact page shows new WhatsApp +91 98259 28587; no old phone present
/cvd Login Gate displays with 'Continue as Guest' button when not authed
/login page shows 'Continue as Guest →' button; clicking navigates to /natural
/natural after guest login shows Single Diamond / Diamond Box toggle (data-testid toggle-single & toggle-parcel) WITHOUT 'Mixed parcels' subtitle
Toggle between Single and Diamond Box works without errors
Add to enquiry on CVD-001 fires exactly ONE sonner toast 'CVD-001 added to enquiry' — duplicate-toast bug is fixed
Basket FAB badge updates to 1 after adding stone
Navbar shows logo image + 'Rainbow Star' wordmark
action_items: MINOR (informational, not a blocker): 8 benign 401 console errors on /api/auth/me when browsing as guest — expected behaviour but consider suppressing to keep console clean.
notes: Admin /admin panel CRUD not deeply exercised in this fast pass; recommend full QA pass for admin Add Diamond form and Enquiry inbox in next round. Argyle glow borders visually present (Argyle stones rendered on /natural).
